download_notes: No live portal navigation performed; application reference identified via secondary sources only.
notes: Full planning permission for One Blackfriars (50‑storey tower plus two low‑rise buildings) was granted in October 2012 under Southwark reference 12/AP/1784. Developer: St George South London Ltd; Architect: Ian Simpson (SimpsonHaugh) ([docslib.org](https://docslib.org/doc/138424/one-blackfriars-in-the-london-borough-of-southwark-planning-application-no-12-ap-1784?utm_source=openai)). The development comprises a 50‑storey tower to 170 m AOD with hotel, residential and retail uses ([docslib.org](https://docslib.org/doc/138424/one-blackfriars-in-the-london-borough-of-southwark-planning-application-no-12-ap-1784?utm_source=openai)). No multi‑phase masterplan or outline consent applies. Not in a London Enterprise Zone. Live portal not accessed for keyVal or documents—requires browser navigation to download GA plans and D&A Statement from Southwark's application detail page.
